lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What surrounded the city of Jericho?
How many times were they to march around the city during the first six days?
What did the parade of Israelites look like as they marched?
answers: Priests blew trumpets and carried the ark, soldiers marched in front and back
Children led the way with torches

questions.text: How many times did the people march around the city on the seventh day?
What did the priests and the people do after marching around seven times?
answers: Built ladders to climb the wall

questions.text: What did Joshua say before telling the soldiers to shout?
answers: The Lord has given you the city; destroy everything, but the treasure belongs to God

questions.text: What happened after the priests blew their trumpets and the people shouted?
Who was saved during the battle?
The Israelites won the battle and Rahab was saved because they had... what?
